message:
⚡ Progressive streaming for compliance hooks (#2167)

* ✨ Add framework descriptions and context to all compliance cards

Compliance cards now explain what they measure and why it matters:

- KubescapeScan: Framework descriptions (NSA-CISA, MITRE ATT&CK, CIS),
  score context labels, colored score bars, controls summary
- TrivyScan: Severity descriptions explaining what each level means,
  actionable guidance for critical CVEs
- ComplianceScore: Context label (Excellent/Good/Needs Attention/Critical),
  progress bars per tool instead of plain numbers
- PolicyViolations: Context banner explaining what violations mean
- ComplianceDrift: Context banner explaining what drift detection does
- CrossClusterPolicyComparison: Context banner about policy consistency
- FleetComplianceHeatmap: Context banner and tool taglines in headers

New shared constants file (lib/constants/compliance.ts) with framework
info, score context, severity descriptions, and tool descriptions.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ⚡ Progressive streaming for compliance hooks

All three compliance hooks (useKyverno, useTrivy, useKubescape) now
update the UI progressively as each cluster finishes scanning instead
of batching all results and updating once at the end.

Before: User stares at empty cards for 20+ seconds until ALL clusters
finish scanning. No data visible until the very last cluster completes.

After: Each cluster's data appears immediately as it finishes. First
cluster with data clears the loading state so cards render instantly.
Cache is saved after all clusters complete.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
